title: Development of retirement home going from strength to strength
description: BUSINESS NEWS - The development of a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - The development of a retirement home at Adler's Nest is going from strength to strength.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - The development of a retirement home at Adler's Nest is going from strength to strength."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Owner Hein Marx had to bring an application to the High Court in order to continue with the development.","html":"Owner Hein Marx had to bring an application to the High Court in order to continue with the development."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Fortunately, the retirement home, located in the unspoilt natural beauty of Aalwyndal, Mossel Bay, is going ahead.","html":"Fortunately, the retirement home, located in the unspoilt natural beauty of Aalwyndal, Mossel Bay, is going ahead."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Over the past seven years, Adler's Nest has maintained an excellent reputation as a facility that, in addition to frail care, provides excellent medical care 24 hours a day.","html":"Over the past seven years, Adler's Nest has maintained an excellent reputation as a facility that, in addition to frail care, provides excellent medical care 24 hours a day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The new retirement home will consist of own title homes and share title apartments. There will also be a community centre that will have everything, including a shop and even a gym, where residents of the retirement home can exercise.","html":"The new retirement home will consist of own title homes and share title apartments. There will also be a community centre that will have everything, including a shop and even a gym, where residents of the retirement home can exercise."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In addition, the retirement home will be pet friendly. Charges will be settled per person and not per unit.","html":"In addition, the retirement home will be pet friendly. Charges will be settled per person and not per unit."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Marx says there will be 100 000 litres of water per day available to residents to wash vehicles and irrigate gardens, among other things. Marx says: \"We will process sewage underground ourselves and therefore ensure enough water.\"","html":"Marx says there will be 100 000 litres of water per day available to residents to wash vehicles and irrigate gardens, among other things. Marx says: \"We will process sewage underground ourselves and therefore ensure enough water.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In addition to all the other benefits for homeowners, the retirement home is unique because it has the most beautiful view of the mountains and the sea.","html":"In addition to all the other benefits for homeowners, the retirement home is unique because it has the most beautiful view of the mountains and the sea."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Homes will be built of face brick so that the maintenance is as low as possible. Modern security will also be available to residents 24 hours a day and homeowners can spend their last years in a safe, beautiful and affordable environment,\" Marx notes","html":"\"Homes will be built of face brick so that the maintenance is as low as possible. Modern security will also be available to residents 24 hours a day and homeowners can spend their last years in a safe, beautiful and affordable environment,\" Marx notes"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"At Adler's Nest we offer a safe, peaceful and quiet environment. Our rules are not rigid, because we want the residents and any visitors to feel as at home as possible here,\" concludes Marx.","html":"\"At Adler's Nest we offer a safe, peaceful and quiet environment. Our rules are not rigid, because we want the residents and any visitors to feel as at home as possible here,\" concludes Marx."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Contact: Hein - 082 801 5399.","html":"Contact: Hein - 082 801 5399."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Visit: www.adlersnest.co.za","html":"Visit: www.adlersnest.co.za"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Development of retirement home going from strength to strength
